channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: Britain’s foreign aid morphs from open-handed to hard-headed
item.description: "In a significant shift, Britain's foreign aid strategy is undergoing a major transformation, prioritizing national interests and stricter conditions. Learn more about this change from open-handed to hard-headed approach: https://www.economist.com/britain/2026/03/26/britains-foreign-aid-morphs-from-open-handed-to-hard-headed"
